message:
test(logging): add 30 tests for logging module (7→37)

Cover LogError Display variants, LogLevel ordering/conversion/FromStr,
LogConfig serde defaults/partial/clone, ensure_parent_dir, set_file_permissions,
MockLogWriter infrastructure, and pretty/JSON format output with spans.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
